xquik.description: Xquik is a Real-time X (Twitter) data platform. 22 MCP tools for tweet search, user lookup, follower/following extraction, engagement metrics, giveaway draws, trending topics, account monitoring with webhooks, reply/retweet/quote extraction, community & Space data, and mutual follow checks. OAuth 2.1 + PKCE authentication, Streamable HTTP transport.
